params.content:
# Code's Death and Abstraction

Steve Krouse argues that AI accelerates English-to-code translation, creating initial precision in vibe coding. However, complexity and edge cases eventually expose limitations. The essay advocates valuing abstraction as a tool for mastering complexity, not just producing software behavior. Stronger AI should enhance the value of better abstractions by addressing harder problems, rather than lowering quality through rapid, low-effort software development.
